are enabled the privilege of admission to medical colleges by 
virtue of their status as a local candidate as per the definition – 
Conduct of examination, admission of students, prescription of fee 
and reservation would be a power conferred on the State u/Entry 
25 of List III – The 2017 Rules is one authorised by the statute, 
which in turn traces the source of its power to the Constitution 
and adopts the definition as available in the Presidential Order. 
[Paras 18-20]
